metadata.name: Helper
metadata.description: Tools > VS Code extension overview. Syntax highlighting, schema-aware completion, preview-on-save for Layout JSON + screen_spec.json. ~5-min read. Four sections: What it does / Install / Features / Known limits.

methods.name: onAppear
methods.description: Seed nextReadLinks from the module-scope NEXT_READ_ENTRIES catalog (two rows: next_cli -> /tools/cli, next_installation -> /learn/installation) and stamp currentLanguage from StringManager.language. Each row's titleKey / descriptionKey is resolved through StringManager with the tools_helper_ namespace prefix.

methods.name: onNavigate
methods.description: Client-side navigation via router.push(url). Destinations are the spec-mapped URLs enumerated in transitions: /, /tools/cli, /learn/installation.

vars.name: nextReadLinks
vars.description: Two closing 'read next' cards pointing at /tools/cli and /learn/installation. Seeded by onAppear from the NEXT_READ_ENTRIES static catalog and re-seeded by onToggleLanguage.

notes: Fifth and final live entry under the Tools tab.
Publisher `jsonui`, extension id `jsonui.jsonui-helper`, v0.1.0. The page links to the Marketplace entry via the install CodeBlock.
